episodes.title: Justice Department says Pam Bondi won’t testify in Epstein probe
episodes.description: The Justice Department says Pam Bondi will not testify before Congress in the Jeffrey Epstein investigation, arguing a subpoena no longer applies.

episodes.title: Bill Gates to testify in House investigation on Jeffrey Epstein
episodes.description: Gates will appear June 10 for a closed-door interview with the House Oversight Committee, cooperating with the investigation into Epstein.

episodes.title: Bill Gates to testify before House committee probing Jeffrey Epstein investigation
episodes.description: Bill Gates is scheduled for a closed-door interview with the House Oversight Committee on June 10 as part of its Jeffrey Epstein investigation.

episodes.title: Guard on-shift when Epstein died in New York prison ordered to testify
episodes.description: Tova Noel has been ordered to testify before a House Oversight Committee. He was supposed to check on Epstein every 20 minutes on Aug. 10, 2019.

episodes.title: Epstein’s former accountant questioned by House panel on financier’s wealth and crimes
episodes.description: Jeffrey Epstein’s longtime accountant faced closed‑door questioning on how Epstein built his fortune, denying wrongdoing and noting a recent $25M victim settlement.

episodes.title: Epstein deposition videos: Hillary Clinton clashes with lawmakers, Bill Clinton speaks on hot tub ph
episodes.description: Epstein deposition videos: Hillary Clinton clashes with lawmakers, Bill Clinton speaks on hot tub photo

episodes.title: More high-profile names under scrutiny in Epstein files fallout
episodes.description: Larry Summers will retire from Harvard amid scrutiny over Epstein ties, while Bill Gates apologizes to foundation staff for meetings with Epstein.

episodes.title: Epstein files spark new investigations
episodes.description: Epstein investigations are underway in at least 10 countries, the DOJ releases documents in the U.S., but critics question redactions of possible co-conspirators.

episodes.title: Backlash grows after release of final Epstein files
episodes.description: A new wave of backlash is emerging following the final release of Epstein files, with political fallout spreading in the U.K. as scrutiny intensifies.

episodes.title: Department of Justice under fire over Epstein files release
episodes.description: The Department of Justice is facing heavy criticism for how it’s releasing court documents linked to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
